args.claim: Climeworks uses solid-sorbent direct air capture (DAC) technology in which modular collectors draw CO₂ from ambient air and then apply heat and/or vacuum to release the captured CO₂ for permanent geological storage.
args.quote: Climeworks’ direct air capture technology uses modular CO₂ collectors filled with a solid sorbent material to capture CO₂ directly from ambient air. Once saturated, the collectors are heated and/or exposed to a vacuum to release high-purity CO₂, which is then permanently stored underground.
